questions.question: The recommended duration of moderate physical activity per week is
questions.explanation: WHO recommends at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic activity weekly.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a component of health-related fitness?
questions.explanation: Beauty is not a component of health-related fitness.

questions.question: The normal resting heart rate for adults is
questions.explanation: Normal resting heart rate for adults is 60-100 bpm.

questions.question: Which exercise improves cardiovascular endurance?
questions.explanation: Running is an excellent cardiovascular exercise.

questions.question: The main purpose of warm-up before exercise is to
questions.explanation: Warm-up increases body temperature and prepares muscles for activity.

questions.question: A nutritious diet should include
questions.explanation: A balanced diet includes all necessary nutrients.

questions.question: The ability to move joints through full range of motion is
questions.explanation: Flexibility is the range of motion in joints.

questions.question: Which is the correct technique for CPR (chest compressions)?
questions.explanation: CPR requires 100-120 chest compressions per minute.

questions.question: The side effects of physical inactivity include
questions.explanation: Physical inactivity leads to obesity and cardiovascular disease.

questions.question: Safe water for drinking should be
questions.explanation: Safe water must be clear, pathogen-free, and properly treated.
